metadata.description: Public marketplace of Claude Code plugins by aantonovg.

plugins.name: sensortower
plugins.description: Sensor Tower MCP server (FastMCP) — 85 tools for app intelligence: rankings, top apps, app metadata, downloads, revenue, demographics, keywords.

plugins.name: libreoffice
plugins.description: Live LibreOffice Writer editing from Claude Code: 65+ MCP tools talking to a LibreOffice extension over HTTP localhost:8765. v1.0.3 adds full symmetric get/set for paragraph and page styles so an agent can faithfully replicate a doc without guessing: get_paragraph_style_def/set_paragraph_style_props expose font/size/bold/italic/underline/color/char_word_mode/alignment/all_indents/line_spacing/tab_stops/context_margin/outline_level/parent/follow; get_page_info/set_page_style_props expose page size/margins/orientation/header+footer (enabled, height, body_distance, margins, text)/columns; get_paragraphs returns page_desc_name + break_type so Word-import master-pages (e.g. MP0) are visible; clone_paragraph_style/clone_page_style/clone_numbering_rule for bulk replication; shutdown_application (graceful Desktop.terminate, no Document-Recovery dialog); .uno:ControlCodes/.uno:SpellOnline added to dispatch allowlist for view toggles. Carries forward v1.0.2: execute_batch auto-locks view (SolarMutex-safe), open_document_live dedups by realpath, create_document_live visible=false.
